response.global_analysis: The provided Reference JSON for 'Slap by Step' contained lyrics for the first verse, but the video segment begins later in the song (pre-chorus/chorus). I have ignored the irrelevant JSON portions and transcribed the actual audio. The Reference JSON for 'Fortune Spinner' was not included in the prompt's scene list, so I have transcribed its English lyrics directly from the audio. All MC dialogue has been transcribed and translated, with timing strictly aligned to vocal activation and no CC tags included.

subtitles.original: 仰ぐ最色のダンスフロア
subtitles.english: Looking up at the most colorful dance floor

subtitles.english: Any kind of 'way' slap

subtitles.english: Don't lose your character

subtitles.english: A matching combo splash

subtitles.english: Clap your hands and stand up please

subtitles.original: 飛び込んじゃっても なせば成る それがセオリーさ
subtitles.english: Even if you dive in, you can do it—that's the theory

subtitles.original: Clap your hands and stand up please
subtitles.english: Clap your hands and stand up please

subtitles.english: Changing regret into steps is the best, right?

subtitles.original: 違っても同じ想い
subtitles.english: Even if we're different, we have the same feelings

subtitles.original: だから、ここから
subtitles.english: So, from here...

subtitles.original: Slap by stepで行こうぜ
subtitles.english: Let's go slap by step

subtitles.original: 360度私なりで
subtitles.english: 360 degrees in my own way

subtitles.english: Whenever there's a chance, in that moment

subtitles.english: Complete control—fall into the swamp!

subtitles.original: 1 2 3 で真相心理
subtitles.english: With a 1, 2, 3, deep inside the heart...

subtitles.original: クラッシュして
subtitles.english: ...it crashes

subtitles.original: 今すぐで 私たちの色に
subtitles.english: Right now, dyed in our colors

subtitles.original: 染めあげた 世界を見せる
subtitles.english: We'll show you the world we've dyed

subtitles.original: 皆様、今年の応援ありがとうございました！
subtitles.english: Everyone, thank you for your support this year!

subtitles.original: ホロIDはもっともっと盛り上がるよ、ずっと見ててね！
subtitles.english: HoloID will get even more exciting, keep watching!

subtitles.original: 来年もよろしくお願いします！ See you next year!
subtitles.english: Please support us next year too! See you next year!

subtitles.original: ウンッ！皆様、森カリオペです！
subtitles.english: Umm! Everyone, I'm Mori Calliope!

subtitles.original: What's up, hololive English -Myth- coming right at ya for a brand new year!
subtitles.english: What's up, hololive English -Myth- coming right at ya for a brand new year!

subtitles.original: 今年すごい盛り上がったね！来年もよろしく！
subtitles.english: It was so exciting this year! Let's do it next year too!

subtitles.original: We're gonna rock the world ten times harder next year. You in? Next up, Ina!
subtitles.english: We're gonna rock the world ten times harder next year. You in? Next up, Ina!

subtitles.original: Wah! Hello everyone, this is Ina! Thank you so much for a really fun 2025!
subtitles.english: Wah! Hello everyone, this is Ina! Thank you so much for a really fun 2025!

subtitles.original: 今年すごく楽しかったです！来年もよろしくお願いしますね！
subtitles.english: This year was so much fun! Please look forward to next year too!

subtitles.original: Yeah, let's go! Next is Kiwawa!
subtitles.english: Yeah, let's go! Next is Kiwawa!

subtitles.original: キキキ！小鳥遊キアラです！
subtitles.english: Kiki! I'm Takanashi Kiara!

subtitles.original: キアラらしく盛り上げるぞー！
subtitles.english: I'll liven things up in Kiara style!

subtitles.original: ギャー！ Myth is here!
subtitles.english: Gya! Myth is here!

subtitles.original: Let's have fun in 2026 too!
subtitles.english: Let's have fun in 2026 too!

subtitles.original: Let's go! やりましょうか！
subtitles.english: Let's go! Shall we do it?

subtitles.original: 2026年もよろしく！
subtitles.english: Please look forward to 2026 too!

subtitles.original: Alright, let's show them what we got!
